author: Weatherman118

stoch_rsi.trigger: K crosses UP through 20 from below — ta.crossover(k, 20)
stoch_rsi.requirement: K must be above D at trigger
stoch_rsi.pre_entry_state: K typically at 0-10 before cross (near absolute zero)

smoothed_ha.trigger: Current candle must be green (sha_close > sha_open)
smoothed_ha.calculation: Double EMA(10,10) on Heikin Ashi values
smoothed_ha.note: First green candle after red = curl forming

zlsma_50.rule: NEVER enter if price is below ZLSMA-50 — trade is invalid
zlsma_50.visual_note: Yellow ZLSMA being 'far below' price during spike = CORRECT and expected. It's a lagging indicator — price above it means strong flow.

confirmed_exit_rules.sha_exit: SHA flips red for 2+ consecutive candles
confirmed_exit_rules.stoch_exit: Stoch RSI K crosses back below 20

confirmed_reentry_rule: Stoch RSI must RESET BELOW 20 and curl UP again — not just mid-range pullback

features: Red EXIT label when position closes
Dashed lines: red=stop, lime=T1, green=T2, teal=T3 — appear the moment you enter
Orange warning label when SHA turns red 2 candles
Red warning label when K drops below 20
Red warning label when price breaks ZLSMA-50
6 alertconditions: Entry, SHA exit, K exit, ZLSMA exit, Curl-no-flow skip, Position closed
Green/red background = above/below ZLSMA flow zone
pine_script_status.known_limitation: Strategy Tester shows unreliable numbers with SHA (non-standard chart warning). Do NOT trust Strategy Tester P&L or win rate with this script. Use manual paper trade log instead.
pine_script_status.user_confirmed: User tested on AIOS 5m May 1 2026 — Pine Script working, BUY fired at $8.62, stock ran to $18.64+ (+136%)

AIOS_2026_05_01.notes: BUY label fired correctly at $8.62 pre-market. Stock ran +136% intraday. Confirms system fires BEFORE the spike, not after.

AHMA_5m.context: CLEAREST ENTRY STATE — K just crossed 20, D still at 10. Perfect curl.

key_insight: Pre-entry Stoch RSI K is consistently 0-20 (usually 0-10) on the 5m chart. Entry fires at the moment K crosses above 20. The Pine Script ta.crossover(k, 20) is correct. This IS the beginning of the spike — not chasing. AIOS May 1 confirmed this live.

important_rules.intraday_only: NEVER hold overnight. Small caps halt/gap down/reverse split without warning. Close same day.
important_rules.pdt_rule: US accounts under $25k are limited to 3 day trades per 5 business days. Use Webull cash account or paper trade until $25k threshold reached.
important_rules.stop_discipline: The -8% stop is NON-NEGOTIABLE. Breaking it is how accounts blow up. W118's edge = tiny losses, huge wins.
important_rules.no_set_and_forget: Cannot automate without daily scanner running. New stocks must be found each morning. TradingView cannot auto-execute trades.
important_rules.strategy_tester_warning: Strategy Tester is UNRELIABLE with SHA scripts. Always shows non-standard chart warning. Ignore those numbers.

roadmap.month_1_2: Paper trade — target 80%+ win rate, 30+ trades minimum
roadmap.month_3: Go live with $100-$500. 1-2 trades/week (PDT limit if under $25k)
roadmap.month_4_6: Reinvest profits, scale positions. Build toward $25k.
roadmap.month_7_12: At $25k: unlimited day trading unlocked. Compounding accelerates.
roadmap.goal: $25k account with 80%+ win rate = $40k-$60k by end of year 1 at current stats

Find which K value range at entry correlates with fastest wins
Identify float range that produces quickest exits at T1/T2
Find which catalyst tiers finish within 2 hours
Determine if pre-entry K below 10 (vs 10-20) produces faster spikes
Output refined entry criteria for 100% 1-2hr trades
